lectures.title: Introduction to the Field
lectures.description: An overview of the core questions and methods in this domain. Covers foundational concepts, key debates, and the landscape of empirical evidence.

required.citation: Smith, J., & Jones, A. (2020). Foundations of the Field. Journal of Example Studies, 10(1), 1–30.
Brown, R. (2018). Key Concepts Explained. Example Press.

suggested.citation: White, C. (2021). A Broader View. Annual Review of Example Research, 5, 100–130.

lectures.title: Methodology and Research Design
lectures.description: Covers quantitative and qualitative methods used in the field. Discusses randomised controlled trials, observational studies, and their trade-offs.

required.citation: Davis, L. (2019). Research Methods for Practitioners. Oxford University Press.

suggested.citation: Miller, P. (2022). Experimental Design in Context. Example Quarterly, 8(2), 45–70.
